prompt: Create a highly realistic macro photograph of a finished hand-embroidery piece in a round wooden embroidery hoop on a rustic wooden craft table, showing a cozy living-room scene stitched on natural beige linen. The embroidery should look tactile and dimensional, with visible satin stitches, long-and-short stitches, French knots, raised thread texture, slight imperfections, and warm handmade charm. The scene contains exactly 8 embroidered pet birds: a large yellow cockatiel sitting in a plush red armchair holding knitting needles, a blue-and-white budgie nestled beside it reading a tiny illustrated magazine, two small birds perched on a wooden bench in the background, two small birds sitting together on a blue sofa reading, one green-and-orange lovebird standing at lower right holding a pink handheld vacuum with little blue motion lines, and one small black-and-gray crested bird at the bottom center. The miniature embroidered room includes a red armchair, a blue sofa, a wooden bench, a desk with tiny bottles, two framed wall pictures, a potted plant, hanging plants, a small orange pendant lamp, pink curtains, a sketched window, a few musical notes, and fine pencil-like construction lines visible on the fabric. Surround the hoop with realistic embroidery supplies: a wooden tray of pastel thread bobbins at the upper left, a paper thread color chart at the upper right, ornate embroidery scissors on the right, a needle and metal thimble at the lower right, green floss at the bottom, and a small note card at lower left with Japanese handwriting. Use warm natural daylight, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the hoop, cozy craft-room atmosphere, earthy colors, and a charming whimsical style that makes the entire illustration appear as if it has been embroidered from a text prompt.
